title: Hornet Removal in Harlem, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Harlem, Manhattan. Safe nest elimination for brownstones, apartments & buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Harlem residents, whether you're in a historic brownstone, a walk-up apartment, or near Marcus Garvey Park. Our professional hornet removal service safely eliminates nests from your property, protecting your family and neighbors from aggressive stings. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective hornet removal throughout Harlem with transparent pricing from $350 to $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Harlem for years, understanding the unique pest challenges of the neighborhood's diverse architecture from Sugar Hill to East Harlem. Our licensed technicians respond quickly, use safe removal methods, and guarantee complete nest elimination to keep your home or business hornet-free.
localContext: Harlem's tree-lined streets, historic buildings, and proximity to green spaces like St. Nicholas Park and Morningside Park create ideal conditions for hornet nesting in eaves, attics, and building overhangs. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war brownstones and modern developments requires experienced professionals who can safely access and remove nests from various architectural styles.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Harlem?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Harlem, Manhattan. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Emergency services are available for nests in high-traffic areas or near children and pets.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the area to prevent return, and disposal of the nest. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Harlem buildings and brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests in Harlem's older buildings, under eaves, in attics, wall voids, and around window frames of brownstones and walk-ups. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to parks also attract hornets looking for sheltered nesting sites.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my Harlem apartment building or neighbors?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, low-toxicity treatments and follow strict safety protocols to protect residents, pets, and the environment. Our technicians are trained to handle multi-unit buildings and work discreetly to minimize disruption to your neighbors while ensuring complete nest elimination.
